reasoning: The stock is facing significant near-term headwinds following a drop in oil prices. Short-term downward momentum and bearish near-term forecasts suggest slight under-performance relative to the anchor price (133.17, last closing price before May 25). However, significant stock buybacks ($200m in Q2 around $128/share) provide a soft floor, and random-walk dynamics dictate that probabilities strongly revert to 0.5 over longer horizons.
